get.description: Get all API tokens for the authenticated user (admins see all)

post.description: Generate a new API token. Raw token is only returned once.

delete.description: Revoke an API token by ID. Immediate loss of access.

get.description: Retrieve audit logs with optional filtering. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.description: Filter by entity type (e.g. monitor, incident)
parameters.name: entity_type

parameters.description: Filter by action (e.g. created, updated, deleted)
parameters.name: action

get.description: Retrieve audit logs filtered by entity type and entity ID. Requires admin privileges.
Download a JSON backup file as an attachment. Requires admin privileges.
Export all configuration data as a JSON backup. Requires admin privileges.
Retrieve backup/import history records. Requires admin privileges.

delete.description: Delete a backup/import history record by ID. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Import configuration from a JSON backup file upload (multipart). Requires admin privileges.
Public endpoint to register a heartbeat ping from a monitor via its heartbeat token. Updates uptime status to "up" and resolves any active incidents.

get.description: Retrieves all incidents. Admins see all, regular users see only their own.

post.description: Creates a new incident for a monitor. Only the monitor owner or an admin can create incidents.

get.description: Retrieves all incidents for a specific monitor. Users can only access their own monitors' incidents; admins can access any.
Retrieves a single incident by ID. Users can only access their own incidents; admins can access any.

put.description: Updates an incident by ID. Only the owner or an admin can update.

delete.description: Deletes an incident by ID. Only the owner or an admin can delete.

get.description: Get all maintenances. Users see their own, admins see all.

post.description: Create a new maintenance window for one or more monitors

get.description: Get a single maintenance by its ID

put.description: Update an existing maintenance window by ID

delete.description: Delete a maintenance window by ID

get.description: Retrieves all monitors. Admins see all, regular users see only their own.

post.description: Creates a new uptime monitor. Non-admin users get enforced defaults (60s interval, 10s timeout). Admin users can set custom values.

get.description: Server-sent events stream for real-time monitor and incident updates. No authentication required.
Returns daily uptime chart data for a public monitor. No authentication required.
Retrieves a single monitor by its ID. Users can only access their own monitors; admins can access any.

put.description: Updates an existing monitor by ID. Non-admin users get enforced default interval/timeout. Only the owner or an admin can update.

delete.description: Deletes a monitor by ID. Only the owner or an admin can delete.

get.description: Get all tags attached to a monitor

delete.description: Remove a tag from a monitor

get.description: Get all status pages for the authenticated user (admin sees all)

post.description: Create a new status page with selected monitors

get.description: Retrieve a status page publicly by its slug
get.summary: Get public status page by slug

post.description: Subscribe an email address to receive status page notifications

get.description: Verify email address for a subscription using a token
Unsubscribe from a status page using an unsubscribe token
Retrieve a single status page by its ID

delete.description: Delete a status page by ID

get.description: Admin-only: get all subscribers for a status page
Get the number of verified subscribers for a status page

post.description: Admin-only: unsubscribe a user from a status page

get.description: Get a Shields.io-style SVG badge for a status page
Get all tags
Get all teams. Admin sees all; user sees own teams.

post.description: Create a new team. Creator becomes team admin.

put.description: Update a team's name. Only team admins.

get.description: Get all members of a team. Accessible by team members and admins.

post.description: Invite a user to join a team. Only team admins.

put.description: Update a team member's role. Only team admins.

delete.description: Remove a member from a team. Only team admins.

get.description: Get all notification channels for the authenticated user (admin sees all)

post.description: Create a new notification channel for the authenticated user

get.description: Get a single notification channel by its ID

put.description: Update an existing notification channel by ID

delete.description: Delete a notification channel by ID

get.description: Get paginated notification logs for the authenticated user (admin sees all)
